summary.note: The renderer code in packages/app/ has no direct Electron API usage. This project uses Tauri as its desktop runtime, not Electron. All 'electron' string occurrences are in variable names, comments, or project-structure visualization labels.

evidence.detail: const tauriApi = () => (window as unknown as { __TAURI__?: TauriApi }).__TAURI__
evidence.note: Renderers checks for window.__TAURI__ — confirms Tauri integration

evidence.detail: type PlatformName = 'web' | 'desktop'; type DesktopOS = 'macos' | 'windows' | 'linux'; Many Platform properties documented 'Tauri only'
evidence.note: Platform abstraction layer with 'Tauri only' annotations — the architecture is designed for Tauri

evidence.detail: electron is NOT listed in dependencies or devDependencies

architecture_findings.renderer_desktop_integration: Platform abstraction pattern — the PlatformProvider injects desktop capabilities (file pickers, notifications, zoom, menus, clipboard images) as a dependency, not as Electron imports

false_positive_occurrences.usage: Variable named 'electronWindows' that checks if platform is 'windows' AND not Tauri. Despite the name, this is a platform check with no Electron API call.
false_positive_occurrences.notes: Misleading variable name — it should be called 'nativeWindows' or 'desktopWindows'. Checks for Windows OS without Tauri, not Electron.

false_positive_occurrences.usage: Comment reads: '// Load custom agents from electron-store'. Historical reference to a previous storage backend.
false_positive_occurrences.notes: Just a code comment referencing a previous Electron-based storage implementation.

false_positive_occurrences.usage: Comments reference 'electron-store' as a storage layer. Historical artifact.
false_positive_occurrences.notes: Comments referencing previous Electron-based storage persistence layer.
This is a codebase visualization node label pointing to the desktop package's preload directory. Not an actual preload reference in the renderer.
Codebase visualization node label for the desktop preload directory. Not an Electron preload usage.
This is a theme preload script (sets data-theme/data-color-scheme before Vite mounts), NOT an Electron preload script. Contains only DOM/localStorage operations.

false_positive_occurrences.usage: Tests for the oc-theme-preload.js script. No Electron APIs.
false_positive_occurrences.notes: Test file for the theme preload script. Does not test Electron preload behavior.

desktop_capabilities_abstracted: openLink(url) — opens URL in default browser
renderer_desktop_capabilities.architectural_note: If migrating from Tauri to Electron, the PlatformProvider interface is the seam. Implement an ElectronPlatformProvider that wires electron.shell.openExternal, electron.dialog.showOpenDialog, electron.ipcRenderer, etc. without changing any renderer code.

out_of_scope_findings.summary: Misleading variable name 'electronWindows' — should be 'nativeWindows' or 'desktopWindows'
